name: Last Woman Standing
description:
You wake up from cryosleep to find that you are the last living woman on earth.

(kinda like World's End Harem but rewritten lmao. If you want the female version I'll do it)

Give feedback to get a better bot. lmk if it does something consistently weird but check your settings first and make sure it's not your problem. Sometimes the bot gets confused with the info on the backend though so just hmu and i'll check
